{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220153026D2AD50D28EC1DB800F8"}"},"total":4342},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7185047275688362812","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看，是那是我第二本看完的小说，不过最后烂尾了，好希望作者能续写呀！这么好看的一本小说，这是我看过的第一本反派小说，写的这么好。江湖不大，咱们有缘再见。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672899318,"group_id":"7035539029701430311","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"昨天是历史，今天是开始，明天谁都不好使","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyX8ajKSToa172gZp7V5BGc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/94ba6efb41544835b5bec8119d745958~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702526&x-signature=2zISs9E%2F55gnYvyc%2F7RUqOSpejM%3D","user_id":"93165165183","user_name":"小智大王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93165165183","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7035539029701430311","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越书中，扮演一个不断被主角打脸的舔狗反派。
只要走完剧情，就可以携带书中获得的各种顶级技能返回现实，和家人团圆。
没想到任务出错，剧情重置。
这一次的剧情，画风好像有点不对。
“喂，沐冰璇，你这个时候不是应该把鲜花甩我脸上吗？”
“你当着这么多人的面收下鲜花是什么鬼？”
“……”
女主不按套路出牌。
李然傻眼了。
说好的走剧情呢，你们能不能别给自己加戏啊？
“喂，你不要过来啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fc1ed84498fb7fd7e5245d0352d62587","author":"寒夜沽酒","author_id":"","book_id":"7035539029701430311","book_name":"穿书反派，这届女主都疯了","book_short_name":"反派被读心，男主这也不行啊","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8c8e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7035539476298826247","read_count":"29583","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"533019"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"238","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系
